S

searchAndSortVisibleCharacters(UserEntity, String, String, String) - Method in class com.gcu.business.CharacterDatabaseService
Searches for characters based on a keyword and user visibility, then sorts the results based on the specified criteria (e.g., newest, oldest, name ascending/descending, level ascending
searchCharacters(String) - Method in interface com.gcu.data.CharacterRepository
Searches for characters using a case-insensitive keyword across multiple fields.
searchVisibleCharacters(UserEntity, String) - Method in class com.gcu.business.CharacterDatabaseService
Searches for characters based on a keyword and user visibility.
setAddedOn(LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.gcu.models.ClassEntity
Sets the timestamp for when the class was added to the database.
setAddedOn(LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.gcu.models.RaceEntity
Sets the timestamp of when the race was added to the database

Sets the class of the character.

Sets the description of the character.

Sets the gender of the character.

Sets the unique identifier for the character.

Sets the level of the character.

Sets the name of the character.

Sets the type of the character.

Sets the description of the class.

Sets the unique identifier of the class.

Sets the name of the class.
setClassType(String) - Method in class com.gcu.models.ClassEntity
Sets the type of the class.

Sets the creation timestamp for the character.

Sets the flagged status of the character.

Sets the image URL for the character.

Sets the password of the user.

Sets the race of the character.

Sets the last updated timestamp for the character.

Sets the timestamp for when the class was last updated.
setUpdatedOn(LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.gcu.models.RaceEntity
Sets the timestamp of when the race was last updated in the database
setUser(UserEntity) - Method in class com.gcu.models.CharacterEntity
Sets the user who created the character.
setUserId(Integer) - Method in class com.gcu.models.UserEntity
Sets the user ID of the user.
setUsername(String) - Method in class com.gcu.models.UserEntity
Sets the username of the user.
setVisibility(Integer) - Method in class com.gcu.models.CharacterEntity
Sets the visibility status of the character.
showCreateForm(Model, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles GET requests to "/characters/create" endpoint, allowing users to access the form for creating a new character.
showEditForm(int, Model, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles GET requests to "/characters/edit/{id}" endpoint, allowing users to access the form for editing an existing character.
showSignInPage() - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.UserController
Handles GET requests to the "/signin" URL and returns the name of the view to be rendered for the sign-in page.
showSignUpPage() - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.UserController
Handles GET requests to the "/signup" URL and returns the name of the view to be rendered for the sign-up page.
signOut(HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.UserController
Handles GET requests to the "/signout" URL, invalidates the user session, and redirects to the home page.
